commands.review_summary:
The PR removes aggregate count copy from Skills, Plugins, Publishers, and Search, moves the Skills List/Grid control into the header, preserves filtered Clear actions, and updates route regression tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR intentionally changes visible discovery-page copy and layout rather than reporting broken runtime behavior requiring reproduction.
